overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a dystopian suburban fringe. The player moves from a neon-lit sidewalk with palm trees, through a dirt junkyard with abandoned vehicles, and along a highway fence toward the distant illuminated skyline of Night City. The atmosphere is dark and moody with pervasive artificial neon lighting and overcast night skies.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath palm trees and glowing neon signs

entered.detail: tall palm tree trunk with fronds silhouetted against the night sky
large cylindrical billboard structure with red and white neon signage
overhead electrical wires crisscrossing the street
illuminated street lamp casting light on the sidewalk
wet concrete pavement reflecting the neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking along a concrete sidewalk at night. Palm trees line the path while a large circular neon billboard glows in the distance. Power lines crisscross overhead and streetlights illuminate the damp pavement. The atmosphere is quiet and empty, with no pedestrians visible.

events.description: turns left off paved sidewalk into unpaved dirt area behind buildings
executes sharp left turn into the dirt lot

agents.ego_description: turns left off the sidewalk and walks through a dirt area behind commercial buildings, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the dirt path away from the camera

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and gravel surface with patches of grass
small weathered wooden building with illuminated windows
derelict vehicle parked near the building

segments.scene_description: The player turns sharply left off the sidewalk into an unpaved dirt lot behind commercial buildings. The ground changes to dirt and gravel as the camera passes a wooden shack and abandoned vehicles. Other pedestrians are visible walking ahead in the same direction, and the neon billboard recedes into the distance.

events.description: passes by abandoned blue van in the dirt lot

agents.ego_description: navigating through the junkyard dirt lot scattered with abandoned vehicles and tires

entered.detail: blue derelict van with broken windows sitting in the dirt
black rubber tires scattered across the dirt ground
metal chain-link fence marking the boundary of the lot

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the open dirt lot, the scene reveals a vehicle junkyard with scattered tires and abandoned cars. A blue van sits prominently to the right while a chain-link fence marks the distant boundary. The wooden shack falls behind as the circular neon billboard becomes more prominent again on the right.

events.description: exits dirt lot onto paved highway shoulder
white van passes by on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: walking along the highway shoulder as vehicles pass by on the adjacent road

notable_agents.action: white van driving past on the highway with headlights on

entered.detail: paved multi-lane highway with yellow dividing lines
metal guardrail separating the shoulder from the road
chain-link fence running parallel to the highway
tall illuminated corporate towers of Night City visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player steps from the dirt lot onto a paved highway shoulder, transitioning to asphalt surface. Vehicles including a white van pass by on the road to the right. A chain-link fence runs along the left side while the distant illuminated skyscrapers of Night City become visible ahead. The circular billboard is no longer in view.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced highway path with city skyline view

agents.ego_description: walking along the fenced highway path toward the illuminated city skyline

entered.detail: wooden utility pole with transformers and overhead wires
elevated highway overpass silhouetted against the sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the chain-link fence along the highway shoulder as the camera approaches the distant city. Utility poles line the path and an overpass structure becomes visible ahead. The skyscrapers grow larger in the frame while the road continues straight toward the illuminated urban center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet, neon-lit suburban sidewalk through a gritty industrial lot and onto a highway heading toward a glowing metropolis. It begins on a damp concrete path lined with palm trees and crisscrossed by power lines, moving toward a large circular neon billboard. As the camera turns sharply left, the pavement gives way to a dirt and gravel lot where the scene shifts past a wooden shack and abandoned vehicles into a sprawling junkyard of scattered tires and rusted cars. The environment then transitions from the dirt lot onto a paved highway shoulder, where the circular billboard vanishes and is replaced by the sight of passing traffic and a long chain-link fence. Finally, the camera follows the fence and utility poles past an overpass, with the illuminated skyscrapers of Night City growing larger and more dominant in the frame.
